description:
Time window with date-time precision for availability/validity

This schema is part of the Long Term Support of Beckn Protocol V2.0 API specification and MUST NOT be extended. Any domain-specific extension must use the property of this schema which is of type Attribute.
title: TimePeriod

endDate.description: End instant (exclusive or inclusive per domain semantics)

startTime.description: Start time of the time period

endTime.description: End time of the time period
